LightningComponentBundle.description: Linked files + optional upload. Portal Add-On: variant record on Experience pages. list/composer = Core c-portal-messaging + compose modal only (see LWC JSDoc).

property.name: variant
property.label: Variant
property.description: record: wire + upload. list/composer: Core messaging LWCs only, not add-on Experience pages.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Host record for linked files and/or lightning-file-upload.

property.name: listMaxVisibleFiles
property.label: List: max visible files (0 = all)
property.description: list variant only. Extra files open in a View more modal.

property.name: listOverflowModalTitle
property.label: List: modal title for all files
